name: Full House
original_name: วุ่นนัก รักเต็มบ้าน
overview: Sentimental tears flood the screen again with the remake of this classic series.Directed and filmed by producer Max Martin Ananda. Everio Birmingham with his team at Swarm Products Company Limited has created a series of viral fever Korean idols for Thailand. Raised and imprinted audiences all over Thailand to imbue art, poetry, romantic vibe. The perfect match between chemicals. A spirit happy nad sad drama that has captured the hearts of people everywhere.

trailers.title: Teaser วุ่นนักรักเต็มบ้าน (Full House Thai version)
